digestDepth.description: Controls how much body/transcript material the Markdown digest should synthesize: simple = short bullets; detailed = richer themes, figures, actors, and implications from articleText/transcript

delivery.description: Feishu: use feishu_webhook (incoming webhook URL) or feishu_app (app + receive_id). Legacy value feishu = feishu_webhook.

feishuApiBase.description: Feishu/Lark Open API host. China: https://open.feishu.cn — International: https://open.larksuite.com

feishuWebhookUrl.description: Custom bot webhook (https://.../bot/v2/hook/...). Overrides FEISHU_WEBHOOK_URL from .env if set.

feishuReceiveId.description: For feishu_app: chat_id (oc_...) or user open_id (ou_...) etc., matching feishuReceiveIdType

feishuChatId.description: Deprecated alias for feishuReceiveId when receive_id_type is chat_id

feishuAppId.description: Optional; prefer FEISHU_APP_ID in .env for secrets hygiene

maxDetailFetchesPerRun.description: Caps HTTP fetches: article pages (COMPETITOR_OFFICIAL / REGULATORY_TRACKING), podcast pages, PDFs

maxPod2txtEpisodesPerRun.description: Max podcast episodes to pull transcripts via pod2txt (same service as follow-builders generate-feed)

maxArticleTextChars.description: Max stripped characters of articleText per item
